cases.title_en: Musk's survival camp forged his pain tolerance
cases.title_zh: 生存训练营锻造了马斯克的耐痛能力
cases.title_original: O veldskool forjou a resistencia a dor de Musk
cases.summary_en: At age 12, Elon Musk was sent to veldskool, a brutal wilderness survival camp in South Africa described as 'a paramilitary Lord of the Flies.' Children were given small rations and encouraged to fight for them. Elon was beaten twice and lost 5 kg. When he returned at nearly 16, now 1.8m tall and trained in judo, he learned that fighting back with one hard punch stopped bullies — a lesson he carried into business.
cases.summary_zh: 12 岁时，马斯克被送到南非的 veldskool——一个被形容为「准军事版《蝇王》」的残酷野外生存营。孩子们分到很少口粮，被鼓励互相争夺。马斯克被打过两次，瘦了 5 公斤。近 16 岁回来时，他已长到 1.8 米并学了柔道，领悟到一拳反击就能震慑霸凌者——他把这一课带进了商业。
cases.summary_original: Aos 12 anos, Elon foi enviado ao veldskool, um brutal acampamento de sobrevivencia na Africa do Sul. As criancas recebiam pequenas racoes e eram incentivadas a lutar por elas. Elon foi espancado duas vezes e perdeu 5 kg. Quando voltou aos quase 16 anos, aprendeu que um soco forte bastava para afastar os agressores.
cases.key_quote: O bullying era considerado uma virtude

cases.title_en: The school beating and father's betrayal
cases.title_original: A surra na escola e a traicao do pai
cases.summary_en: A schoolmate and friends ambushed Elon during recess, kicked him in the head, threw him down stairs, and beat him until his face was unrecognizable. He was hospitalized for a week. When he came home, his father Errol sided with the attacker and berated Elon for an hour, calling him an idiot and useless. The emotional scars from his father's reaction shaped Musk's psychology far more than the physical assault.
cases.summary_original: Um colega e seus amigos emboscaram Elon no intervalo, o espancaram ate seu rosto ficar irreconhecivel. Quando chegou em casa, seu pai Errol deu razao ao agressor e repreendeu Elon por uma hora, chamando-o de idiota e inutil.
cases.key_quote: Tive que ficar em pe por uma hora enquanto ele gritava comigo

cases.title_en: Childhood trauma as engine of fearless risk-taking
cases.title_zh: 童年创伤成为无畏冒险的引擎
cases.title_original: O trauma de infancia como motor da inovacao sem medo
cases.summary_en: Musk's first wife Justine observed that his abusive childhood forced him to shut down emotionally — making him both insensitive and fearless. During the 2008 crisis when SpaceX's first three rockets exploded and Tesla was near bankruptcy, his childhood-forged pain tolerance kept him going while he woke up thrashing from nightmares. Grimes noted he learned in childhood that life is pain.
cases.summary_zh: 马斯克第一任妻子贾斯汀观察到，他的虐待型童年迫使他情感封闭——既冷漠又无畏。2008 年危机时，SpaceX 前三枚火箭爆炸、特斯拉濒临破产，童年锻造的耐痛力支撑他挺过去，尽管他常从噩梦中惊醒。Grimes 说他从小就学会了：人生即痛苦。
cases.summary_original: A primeira esposa de Musk, Justine, observou que a infancia abusiva o forcou a se fechar emocionalmente. Durante a crise de 2008, quando os tres primeiros foguetes da SpaceX explodiram e a Tesla estava a beira da falencia, sua resistencia a dor forjada na infancia o manteve firme.
cases.key_quote: A adversidade me moldou. Minha resistencia a dor e bem alta.
cases.key_quote_zh: 逆境塑造了我。我的耐痛力很高。

cases.title_en: Twitter acquisition driven by childhood bullying
cases.title_original: A compra do Twitter motivada pelo bullying da infancia
cases.summary_en: In early 2022, despite acknowledging his addiction to crisis and drama, Musk secretly began buying Twitter shares. Offered a board seat, he decided at Larry Ellison's Hawaii house he needed full control. After gaming until 5 AM with Grimes, he launched his hostile takeover. Isaacson draws a direct line: whenever Musk felt threatened, he remembered childhood bullying. Now he had the chance to become the owner of the playground.
cases.summary_original: No inicio de 2022, Musk secretamente comecou a comprar acoes do Twitter. Decidiu na casa de Larry Ellison no Havai que precisava de controle total. Isaacson traca uma linha direta: agora ele tinha a oportunidade de se tornar o dono do parquinho.

cases.title_en: Haldeman trades his car for a plane he can't fly
cases.title_original: Haldeman troca seu carro por um aviao que nao sabe pilotar
cases.summary_en: Elon's grandfather Joshua Haldeman lost his farm in the Depression. One day he spotted a Luscombe monoplane for sale. Despite having no money and no pilot training, he convinced the farmer to accept his car as payment, then hired someone to fly it home and teach him. The family became the Flying Haldemans and were first to fly single-engine from Africa to Australia. Joshua died when a student pilot hit a power line. The family motto: 'Live dangerously — carefully.'
cases.summary_original: O avo materno de Elon perdeu sua fazenda na Depressao. Um dia, viu um monomotor a venda e convenceu o fazendeiro a aceitar seu carro como pagamento, sem saber pilotar. A familia ficou conhecida como os Haldeman Voadores. Lema da familia: Viva perigosamente... com cautela.

cases.title_en: 8-year-old Musk's relentless campaign for a motorcycle
cases.title_original: A campanha implacavel de Musk aos 8 anos por uma moto
cases.summary_en: At age 8, Elon decided he wanted a motorcycle. Every night for weeks, he stood beside his father's armchair making the case. When told to be quiet, he stood in silence, then started again. Kimbal called it extraordinary to watch. The father finally caved and bought a 50cc Yamaha. Earlier at age 5, Elon had walked alone for two hours across Pretoria to reach a birthday party he'd been grounded from attending.
cases.summary_original: Aos 8 anos, Elon decidiu que queria uma moto. Todas as noites por semanas, ficava ao lado da poltrona do pai. Quando mandado ficar quieto, ficava em silencio e depois recomecava. O pai finalmente cedeu. Aos 5 anos, ja tinha caminhado duas horas sozinho ate a casa do primo.
cases.key_quote: Ele tinha essa determinacao feroz que espanta e as vezes assusta

cases.title_en: Musk wins D&D tournament by identifying the villain instantly
cases.title_original: Musk vence torneio de D&D identificando o vilao instantaneamente
cases.summary_en: Young Elon and his cousins entered a D&D tournament in Johannesburg as the youngest players. The game master set their quest: save a woman by finding and killing the villain. Elon looked at the master and said 'I think you're the villain' — then killed him. He was right, and a game designed to last hours ended immediately. The organizers accused them of cheating. Notably, as a D&D game master himself, Elon was 'incredibly patient,' a side rarely seen in his adult personality.
cases.summary_original: O jovem Elon e seus primos entraram num torneio de D&D em Joanesburgo como os jogadores mais jovens. Elon olhou para o mestre e disse: Acho que voce e o vilao — e o matou. Estava certo, e o jogo acabou imediatamente.
cases.key_quote: Acho que voce e o vilao

cases.title_en: 13-year-old Musk sells his first video game for $500
cases.title_original: Musk vende seu primeiro videogame aos 13 anos por 500 dolares
cases.summary_en: After buying a Commodore VIC-20 with money from odd jobs, Elon completed a 60-hour BASIC programming course in three days with almost no sleep. He pestered his father nightly with a clipped ad until allowed to attend a computer conference; professors there said the boy needed a new computer. At 13, he developed Blastar using 123 lines of BASIC and sold it to PC and Office Technology magazine for $500 — his first commercial product.
cases.summary_original: Apos comprar um Commodore VIC-20, Elon completou um curso de 60 horas de BASIC em tres dias. Aos 13 anos, desenvolveu o Blastar usando 123 linhas de BASIC e vendeu a uma revista por 500 dolares — seu primeiro produto comercial.
cases.key_quote: Fiz em tres dias, quase sem dormir

cases.title_en: Leaving South Africa with $4,000 and his father's scorn
cases.title_original: Deixando a Africa do Sul com 4.000 dolares e o desprezo do pai
cases.summary_en: At 17, Elon went to the Canadian consulate alone and filled out passport forms for himself, his mother, brother, and sister — but not his father. On June 11, 1989, he dined at Pretoria's finest restaurant before heading to the airport. His father's parting words: 'You'll be back in a few months. You'll never be successful.' He arrived in Montreal with $4,000 total.
cases.summary_original: Aos 17 anos, Elon foi sozinho ao consulado canadense e preencheu formularios de passaporte para todos exceto o pai. O pai o desprezou: Voce nunca vai ser bem-sucedido. Chegou a Montreal com 4.000 dolares.

cases.title_en: Musk takes the $18/hr boiler cleaning job nobody wants
cases.title_original: Musk aceita o trabalho de limpar caldeiras que ninguem quer
cases.summary_en: After arriving in Vancouver with minimal savings, Musk noticed most jobs paid $5/hour, but boiler cleaning at a lumber mill paid $18. The job required a hazmat suit and crawling through a tunnel into a boiling wood-pulp chamber to scrape calcium from walls. If you didn't scrape fast enough, you'd be trapped drenched in sweat. He called it 'a Dickensian steampunk nightmare.'
cases.summary_original: Ao chegar em Vancouver, Musk viu que a maioria dos trabalhos pagava 5 dolares por hora, mas limpar caldeiras pagava 18. Descreveu como um pesadelo dickensiano steampunk.
cases.key_quote: Era como um pesadelo dickensiano steampunk

cases.title_en: Brady bonds idea rejected — birth of PayPal mindset
cases.title_original: Ideia dos titulos Brady rejeitada — nasce a mentalidade PayPal
cases.summary_en: During a Scotiabank internship, Musk noticed US-guaranteed Brady bonds trading at 20 cents on the dollar when they should be worth at least 50 cents. He called Goldman Sachs and asked to buy $5 million worth. They said yes. But the bank's CEO rejected the idea. Mentor Peter Nicholson said this gave Musk 'a healthy disrespect for the financial industry and the audacity to later start PayPal.' Musk also learned he didn't enjoy working for others.
cases.summary_original: Durante estagio no Scotiabank, Musk percebeu que titulos Brady estavam a 20 centavos quando deveriam valer 50. Ligou para o Goldman Sachs perguntando se podia comprar 5 milhoes. O banco rejeitou. Nicholson disse que isso deu a Musk a audacia para criar a PayPal.
cases.key_quote: Voce ja pensou em carros eletricos?

cases.title_en: Musk drops Stanford to catch the internet wave
cases.title_original: Musk larga Stanford para pegar a onda da internet
cases.summary_en: Accepted to Stanford for a PhD in materials science, Musk grew worried: 'Most PhD holders are irrelevant.' He identified three things that would affect humanity: internet, sustainable energy, and space travel. When Netscape's IPO reached $2.9 billion in a single day in 1995, he knew the internet wouldn't wait. Mentor Nicholson advised: 'The internet revolution will only happen once; go for it while the forge is hot.' Musk enrolled at Stanford and immediately deferred — he never went back.
cases.summary_original: Aceito em Stanford para doutorado, Musk ficou preocupado: A maioria dos doutorados e irrelevante. Quando a IPO da Netscape atingiu 2,9 bilhoes em um dia, soube que a internet nao esperaria. Nicholson aconselhou: Va nessa enquanto a forja esta quente. Musk trancou Stanford imediatamente.
cases.key_quote: A revolucao da internet so vai acontecer uma vez na vida
